system.description:
Strikers are the runners who close. They came up in breach teams, fast-response units, and the kind of street crew that learned early that the second second of a fight is more important than the first. They favor short, brutal weapons paired with mid-range autofire, the loadout of an operator who is going to be in three rooms in the next forty seconds.

On the job, the Striker is the one who hits the door first and never quite stops moving. They are aggressive in the way that good assault doctrine is aggressive: not reckless, but committed. The plan turns on them being in the breach when it counts, and they have spent years getting comfortable with the feeling.
system.grants: Breach and clear movement, combined arms assault stance, momentum-based attack bonuses.

wizard.tagline: Aggressive assault operator who breaches, clears, and keeps moving
